Shiny Assistant has been available for some time now,[^1] but I haven't seen any call out how amazing it is at generating reproducible examples (reprexes), so I thought I'd write up some use-cases I've found helpful. 

[^1]: The [initial blog post](https://shiny.posit.co/blog/posts/shiny-assistant/) was October 4th, 2024.

## Downloadable reports 

**Situation**: You're having trouble getting the graphs and tables in your application included in the downloadable report (HTML and PDF).
